mapper.select: SELECT ef.SEQ, ef.CODE_NO, ef.CODE_NAME, ef.FORMULA, ef.REMARK, ef.ACTIVITY, TO_CHAR(ef.ORDERNO) AS ORDER_NO, TO_CHAR(ef.CREATE_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS CREATE_DATE, GET_UPDATED_INFO(ef.CREATED_BY) || ' ' || ef.CREATED_IP AS CREATED_BY, TO_CHAR(ef.UPDATE_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI') AS UPDATE_DATE, GET_UPDATED_INFO(ef.UPDATED_BY) || ' ' || ef.UPDATED_IP AS UPDATED_BY FROM EVS_FORMULA ef WHERE ef.SEQ = #{seq, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND ef.CPNY_ID = #{cpnyId, jdbcType=VARCHAR}
SELECT ef.SEQ AS CODE_NO, ef.CODE_NAME FROM EVS_FORMULA ef WHERE ef.CPNY_ID = #{cpnyId, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND ef.ACTIVITY = '1' ORDER BY TO_NUMBER(ef.SEQ)
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO EVS_FORMULA ( SEQ, CODE_NO, CODE_NAME, FORMULA, REMARK, ACTIVITY, ORDERNO, CPNY_ID, CREATED_BY, CREATED_IP, CREATE_DATE ) VALUES ( #{seq, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{codeNo, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{codeName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{formula, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{remark, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, NVL(#{activity, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, '1'),
#{orderNo, jdbcType=VARCHAR} 200 , #{cpnyId, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{adminID, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{adminIP, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, SYSDATE )
mapper.update: UPDATE EVS_FORMULA SET CODE_NAME = #{codeName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, FORMULA = #{formula, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, REMARK = #{remark, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, ACTIVITY = NVL(#{activity, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, '1'), ORDERNO = #{orderNo, jdbcType=VARCHAR} ORDERNO , UPDATED_BY = #{adminID, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, UPDATED_IP = #{adminIP, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, UPDATE_DATE = SYSDATE WHERE SEQ = #{seq, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND CPNY_ID = #{cpnyId, jdbcType=VARCHAR}
